subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested His Cause, shed abroad His light, made His dawn to break, unveiled His full moon, and caused His star to shine forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر امره و اشرق نوره و لاح فجره و طلع بدره و سطع نجمه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @day of Resurrection; Judgement
